items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include specific details or outcomes related to the scenario of splitting payments between two cards. While the exploratory step outlines the expected behavior, there are no concrete traces or snapshots captured that demonstrate the system's handling of this payment method. Therefore, it is not possible to confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it results in a failure report, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
